title: Uber, DoorDash Explore Delivery Hero Deal at Possible 19% Premium
description: Uber (NYSE:UBER) and DoorDash (NASDAQ:DASH) are moving deeper into the Delivery Hero SE (DELHY) story, with both U.S. companies reportedly holding early talks with investors as they weigh possible separate takeover proposals for the German food-delivery group. According to people familiar with the matter, those discussions have centered on acquiring multiple stakes from Delivery Hero investors, while some shareholders have indicated they may want more than 40 per share. For Uber, the potential deal could be a major expansion swing in global food delivery, but the first price signal appears to have fallen short.

title: US bank says Delivery Hero shares have further to run as Uber and DoorDash circle the Berlin-based group
description: Jefferies has raised its target price on Delivery Hero (XETRA:DHER, OTCQX:DLVHF) from €29 to €42.50, arguing that the scramble by Uber Technologies Inc (NYSE:UBER, XETRA:UT8)and DoorDash to acquire the German food delivery group is just the beginning of an endgame that should push the shares...

title: Did Goldman’s Conviction List Nod and GOV Momentum Just Shift DoorDash's (DASH) Investment Narrative?
description:
Earlier in May 2026, Goldman Sachs added DoorDash to its U.S. Conviction List, citing strong Marketplace Gross Order Value growth, expanding restaurant, grocery and retail engagement, and upbeat guidance for Q2 2026 Marketplace GOV and adjusted EBITDA.
This endorsement highlights how DoorDash’s push beyond core restaurant delivery into broader local commerce, underpinned by Deliveroo integration and DashPass growth, is increasingly central to how analysts view the business.
We’ll now examine...

title: Delivery Hero Jumps as Investors Bet on Sweetened Takeover Offer
Delivery Hero shares rise 10% as rival Uber mulls another takeover bid
description: Delivery Hero confirmed in a statement on Saturday that it had received a takeover offer from Uber of €33 per share.
